title: jq bug fix and enhancement update
overview: An update for Oracle Linux is now available for Oracle Linux 10.
description:
[1.7.1-11]
- AddressSanitizer: stack-buffer-overflow in jq_fuzz_execute

[1.7.1-10]
- Fix signed integer overflow in jvp_array_write

[1.7.1-9]
- performance test support glibc preload test
full_text:
[1.7.1-11]
- AddressSanitizer: stack-buffer-overflow in jq_fuzz_execute

[1.7.1-10]
- Fix signed integer overflow in jvp_array_write

[1.7.1-9]
- performance test support glibc preload test

References:
https://linux.oracle.com/errata/ELBA-2025-20183-0.html
